Off Calendar May-09-2013 Judgment Entered

Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grandy, not reported, clerk J. Kong, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Peter Sgromo appears in pro per with witness/dog walker, Ms. Hwelon. Respondent, Jennifer Petherick appears in pro per. parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge O'Grady.
